items.title: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year
items.content: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest.

items.title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
items.content: Research appears to reveal a bug that could render the feature effectively useless.

items.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
items.content: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

items.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
items.content: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro.

items.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
items.content: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

items.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
items.content: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

items.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
items.content: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
items.content: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

items.title: Nearly a Million Investors Lost a Total of $3.8 Billion on Trump Crypto Coin
items.content: A report from a cryptocurrency analytics firm details how those who bought the Trump memecoin have fared, with most retail investors having lost money while sophisticated trad

items.title: Are the ‘MANGOS’ Stocks Already Turning Soft?
items.content: Wall Street loves an acronym. The latest one stands for Meta, Anthropic, Nvidia and three other companies at the center of the artificial intelligence boom.

items.title: The Rise of Racetrack Country Clubs: ‘Racing Is Golf on Steroids’
items.content: A motorsports club north of Miami, on former orange groves, is being built to cater to enthusiasts and well-heeled novices eager to hit the gas and pull some Gs.

items.title: David S. Doty, Judge Who Helped Shape the Modern N.F.L., Dies at 96
items.content: He presided over the 1993 agreement that led to free agency and the salary cap, and for years oversaw the league’s disputes with its players.
